properties.name: className

properties.name: accordion

properties.name: children

properties.name: onChange

properties.description: Actual identifier for autotesting, will be passed to HTML attribute data-testid
properties.name: testId

properties.description: Width in pixels
properties.name: width

properties.description: Hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents
properties.name: inputMode

properties.description: Specify that a standard HTML element should behave like a defined custom built-in element
properties.name: is

properties.description: Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox, group, or application.
properties.name: aria-activedescendant

properties.description: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.
properties.name: aria-atomic

properties.description:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.
properties.name: aria-autocomplete

properties.description: Indicates an element is being modified and that assistive technologies MAY want to wait until the modifications are complete before exposing them to the user.
properties.name: aria-busy

properties.description: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.
properties.name: aria-checked

properties.description: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colcount

properties.description: Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colindex

properties.description: Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colspan

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current element.
properties.name: aria-controls

properties.description: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.
properties.name: aria-current

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
properties.name: aria-describedby

properties.description: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.
properties.name: aria-details

properties.description: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.
properties.name: aria-disabled

properties.description: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.
properties.name: aria-dropeffect

properties.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.
properties.name: aria-errormessage

properties.description: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.
properties.name: aria-expanded

properties.description:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at the user's discretion,
allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading in document source order.
properties.name: aria-flowto

properties.description: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.
properties.name: aria-grabbed

properties.description: Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog, that can be triggered by an element.
properties.name: aria-haspopup

properties.description: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.
properties.name: aria-hidden

properties.description: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.
properties.name: aria-invalid

properties.description: Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an element.
properties.name: aria-keyshortcuts

properties.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.
properties.name: aria-label

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
properties.name: aria-labelledby

properties.description: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.
properties.name: aria-level

properties.description: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.
properties.name: aria-live

properties.description: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.
properties.name: aria-modal

properties.description: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.
properties.name: aria-multiline

properties.description: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.
properties.name: aria-multiselectable

properties.description: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.
properties.name: aria-orientation

properties.description:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.
properties.name: aria-owns

properties.description:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.
properties.name: aria-placeholder

properties.description: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-posinset

properties.description: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.
properties.name: aria-pressed

properties.description: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.
properties.name: aria-readonly

properties.description: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.
properties.name: aria-relevant

properties.description: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.
properties.name: aria-required

properties.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.
properties.name: aria-roledescription

properties.description: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowcount

properties.description: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowindex

properties.description: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowspan

properties.description: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.
properties.name: aria-selected

properties.description: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-setsize

properties.description: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.
properties.name: aria-sort

properties.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemax

properties.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemin

properties.description: Defines the current value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuenow

properties.name: aria-valuetext

properties.name: aria-level

properties.description: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.
properties.name: aria-live

properties.description: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.
properties.name: aria-modal

properties.description: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.
properties.name: aria-multiline

properties.description: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.
properties.name: aria-multiselectable

properties.description: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.
properties.name: aria-orientation

properties.description:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.
properties.name: aria-owns

properties.description:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.
properties.name: aria-placeholder

properties.description: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-posinset

properties.description: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.
properties.name: aria-pressed

properties.description: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.
properties.name: aria-readonly

properties.description: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.
properties.name: aria-relevant

properties.description: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.
properties.name: aria-required

properties.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.
properties.name: aria-roledescription

properties.description: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowcount

properties.description: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowindex

properties.description: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowspan

properties.description: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.
properties.name: aria-selected

properties.description: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-setsize

properties.description: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.
properties.name: aria-sort

properties.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemax

properties.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemin

properties.description: Defines the current value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuenow

properties.description: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuetext

properties.description: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.
properties.name: aria-atomic

properties.description:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.
properties.name: aria-autocomplete

properties.description: Indicates an element is being modified and that assistive technologies MAY want to wait until the modifications are complete before exposing them to the user.
properties.name: aria-busy

properties.description: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

properties.description: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.

properties.description: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.
properties.name: aria-dropeffect

properties.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

properties.description: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.
properties.name: aria-expanded

properties.description:

properties.name: tabBarExtraContent

properties.description: TabPane's className
properties.name: className

properties.description: Tabs position
properties.name: tabPosition

properties.description: Current TabPane's key
properties.name: activeKey

properties.description: Initial active TabPane's key, if activeKey is not set
properties.name: defaultActiveKey

properties.description:
Callback executed when active tab is changed 
If `false` is returned, tab transition will be prevented
properties.name: onChange

properties.description: Callback executed when tab is clicked
properties.name: onTabClick

properties.description: Style properties
properties.name: style

properties.description: Whether destroy inactive TabPane when change tab
properties.name: destroyInactiveTabPane

properties.description: Add horizontal padding (24px)
properties.name: padding

properties.description: Removes the margin from the component
properties.name: noMargin

properties.description: Actual identifier for autotesting, will be passed to HTML attribute data-testid
properties.name: testId

properties.description: Hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents
properties.name: inputMode

properties.description: Specify that a standard HTML element should behave like a defined custom built-in element
properties.name: is

properties.description: Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox, group, or application.
properties.name: aria-activedescendant

properties.description: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.
properties.name: aria-atomic

properties.description:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.
properties.name: aria-autocomplete

properties.description: Indicates an element is being modified and that assistive technologies MAY want to wait until the modifications are complete before exposing them to the user.
properties.name: aria-busy

properties.description: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.
properties.name: aria-checked

properties.description: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colcount

properties.description: Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colindex

properties.description: Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-colspan

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current element.
properties.name: aria-controls

properties.description: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.
properties.name: aria-current

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
properties.name: aria-describedby

properties.description: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.
properties.name: aria-details

properties.description: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.
properties.name: aria-disabled

properties.description: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.
properties.name: aria-dropeffect

properties.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.
properties.name: aria-errormessage

properties.description: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.
properties.name: aria-expanded

properties.description:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at the user's discretion,
allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading in document source order.
properties.name: aria-flowto

properties.description: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.
properties.name: aria-grabbed

properties.description: Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog, that can be triggered by an element.
properties.name: aria-haspopup

properties.description: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.
properties.name: aria-hidden

properties.description: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.
properties.name: aria-invalid

properties.description: Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an element.
properties.name: aria-keyshortcuts

properties.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.
properties.name: aria-label

properties.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
properties.name: aria-labelledby

properties.description: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.
properties.name: aria-level

properties.description: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.
properties.name: aria-live

properties.description: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.
properties.name: aria-modal

properties.description: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.
properties.name: aria-multiline

properties.description: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.
properties.name: aria-multiselectable

properties.description: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.
properties.name: aria-orientation

properties.description:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.
properties.name: aria-owns

properties.description:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.
properties.name: aria-placeholder

properties.description: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-posinset

properties.description: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.
properties.name: aria-pressed

properties.description: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.
properties.name: aria-readonly

properties.description: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.
properties.name: aria-relevant

properties.description: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.
properties.name: aria-required

properties.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.
properties.name: aria-roledescription

properties.description: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowcount

properties.description: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowindex

properties.description: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.
properties.name: aria-rowspan

properties.description: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.
properties.name: aria-selected

properties.description: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.
properties.name: aria-setsize

properties.description: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.
properties.name: aria-sort

properties.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemax

properties.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuemin

properties.description: Defines the current value for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuenow

properties.description: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.
properties.name: aria-valuetext
